use_cases: Hero section headlines with animated reveal effects
Feature highlights that animate into view on scroll
Marketing copy with sliding highlight accents
Emphasis text with directional reveal animations
ai_summary: A typography component that creates a sliding highlight effect behind text, revealing content from any direction (left, right, top, bottom) with spring-based animations. Uses mix-blend-difference for a distinctive inverted color effect that works across light and dark themes. Perfect for creating animated text emphasis in hero sections and feature callouts.
